motion.scroll_reveal: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true }} transition={{ duration: 0.6, ease: 'easeOut' }}
motion.pulse_network: animate={{ scale: [1, 1.02, 1], opacity: [0.8, 1, 0.8] }} transition={{ duration: 3, repeat: Infinity, ease: 'easeInOut' }}

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center min-h-[90vh] pt-32 pb-20
sections.instructions: Use light, airy background. Left side: Text content. Right side: use 'network_3d' image floating, or 'abstract_bg' as a subtle backdrop for the whole hero. KPI Ticker should be a horizontal scrolling marquee or a glassmorphic floating card showing '3,080 retailers · 91 distributors · 6 regions'.

sections.name: Trusted By
sections.layout: flex justify-center items-center space-x-12 opacity-50 grayscale py-12 border-y border-slate-100
sections.instructions: Use text-based logos for partners like 'UNILEVER', 'NESTLE', 'P&G' in a bold, wide font to keep it looking clean and enterprise, avoiding mixed image styles.

sections.name: Ecosystem Intelligence (Connectivity)
sections.instructions: Show a bento-box diagram mapping Manufacturer -> Distributor -> Retailer -> Logistics. Use subtle borders, pure white background, and SVG connecting lines.

sections.name: Proactive Intelligence Cards
sections.instructions: Three cards with 'glassmorphism' effect over a subtle gray pattern. Card 1: 'Stockout predicted in Lagos' (Critical red indicator). Card 2: 'Rainfall may increase beverage demand' (Info blue indicator). Card 3: 'Traffic congestion affecting deliveries' (Warning yellow indicator). Embed small data vizzes inside.

sections.name: Dashboard Showcase
sections.instructions: Simulate screenshots of the actual product (Intel, Network Map, POS book). Use pure white rounded cards with border-slate-200 and shadow-2xl. Stack and overlap them to create a deep, layered 'investor-ready' presentation on a slate-50 background.

sections.name: Pricing Teaser
sections.layout: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 py-24 max-w-5xl mx-auto
sections.instructions: Three tiers: Connect, Insights, Predictive. Clean white cards with 1px border. The 'Predictive' card should have the signature gradient border ('The Tracing Beam' effect). CTA: 'Talk to sales'.

sections.name: Compliance Strip
sections.instructions: High contrast dark strip communicating 'NDPR Compliant' and 'Nigeria-region hosting'. Use monospace or uppercase tracking labels.

sections.name: Footer
sections.layout: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-8 py-24 bg-slate-50 border-t border-slate-200
sections.instructions: Clean links. Include role login links (Manufacturer Login, Distributor Login, Retailer Login).

sections.name: Left Marketing Panel
sections.layout: hidden lg:flex w-1/2 relative bg-slate-900 items-center justify-center p-12 overflow-hidden
sections.instructions: Use 'hero_bg' as a background image. Add a gradient overlay to ensure text contrast. Include a powerful quote in white text: 'Orchestrating the future of retail distribution.'

sections.name: Right Auth Panel
sections.layout: w-full lg:w-1/2 flex items-center justify-center p-8 lg:p-24 bg-white
sections.instructions: Centered clean form. Custom email + password JWT. 'Welcome to the Command Center'. Use Shadcn Input and Button components.

invite_page.instructions: Same split-screen layout as login_page, but the form is for claiming an invitation ('Accept Invite'). Form logic will read the :token from the URL.

components.card: Flat, pure white background, 1px border-slate-200, no shadow by default, subtle shadow-lg on hover.
components.button_primary: bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors
components.button_accent: bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-500 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity
components.badge: uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-slate-100 text-slate-900

instructions_to_main_agent: Install framer-motion and lucide-react if not present.
Build the UI in light mode exclusively. Do NOT use dark theme backgrounds for anything except the compliance strip.
For the Dashboard Showcase, construct React components that visually look like screenshots of the existing views (Intel, Network Map, POS). Use white cards with subtle borders.
For the login/invite pages, do NOT use a centered card layout. It MUST be a full-height split-screen layout with the 'hero_bg' image on the left side.
Use the provided image URLs exactly as specified in the 'media' object. Do NOT use placeholder services.
Implement the live KPI ticker using a marquee or framer-motion infinite scroll.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
